creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pav         2008-11-14 13:53:36 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    print                Makefile 
  Added files:
    print/latex-supertabular Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  The supertabular bundle defines the supertabular and supertabular*
  environments.  They make it possible to have a tabular that spans multiple
  pages.  Each page is its own tabular environment, thus the various parts may
  have different widths.
  
  WWW: http://www.ctan.org/tex-archive/macros/latex/contrib/supertabular/
  
  PR:             ports/126673
  Submitted by:   Jorge Niedbalski <niedbalski@gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.463     +1 -0      ports/print/Makefile
  1.1       +53 -0     ports/print/latex-supertabular/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +18 -0     ports/print/latex-supertabular/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/print/latex-supertabular/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +10 -0     ports/print/latex-supertabular/pkg-plist (new)
